chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4608 of 2025 [M/S International Building Pvt. Ltd. v. P.O Sindh and others] DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). 1. For orders on Misc. No.19222/2025. 2. For orders on office objections No.1 to 7. 3. For orders on Misc. No.19223/2025. 4. For orders on Misc. No.19224/2025. 5. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 24.09.2025 Mr. Blosch Ahmed Junejo, Advocate for the Petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Granted. 2-5. After arguing the matter at some length, learned Counsel for the Petitioner does not press this Petition and submits that he will avail his remedy before the competent Court of law. The Petition stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
